title: phalangium
intro: Phalangium, commonly known as the Indian Mulberry or Jambu, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant is known for its numerous health benefits, including the ability to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The therapeutic actions of Phalangium include its ability to act as a vasodilator, improving blood circulation and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of Phalangium include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
